title: Protect My Pets!
description: Adds the Golden Tag, a special tag to give to your pets to make them invincible as long as the tag has durability.
body:
# Protect My Pets! This mod adds a new item, the **Golden Tag**. This item can be applied to a pet to give them this tag, and they will turn invincible as long as the tag has durability. ## Configuration Located at the corresponding location for each loader:

**NeoForge:** `config/Protect My Pets/protect-my-pets_config.toml`
**Forge:** `world/serverconfig/Protect My Pets/protect-my-pets_config.toml`,

This config file allows you to customize a couple things. You can customize: - What entities the tag can be applied to - The durability of the tag ## How does it work? When wearing the tag, your pets do not get hurt. Instead, all the damage is directed to the tag's durability. Once it reaches zero, the tag breaks, and you have to make another. Tags cannot be repaired, but they can be taken off by pressing `Shift` and `Right click` on your pet while holding shears. If you press `Shift` and `Right click` on your pet with nothing on your hand, you'll be able to see the pet's tag's durability. The Golden Tag can be crafted like this: ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468b9dea7be3ef71dc914290504bbe170af19534.png)
